title: Studies on the mechanisms of resistance in pearl millet  genotypes to downy mildew disease
abstract:
Studies on histopathological, anatomical, and biochemical differences between
resistant and susceptible pearl millet genotypes in relation to downy mildew disease were
undertaken at the ICRISAT Ada center, Hyderabad. Indirect sporangial germination by
producing zoospores was observed. Loaspwe germ tubs penetrated the leaves directly
through the epidermal cells, with or without appressarla and very rarely through stomata.
